hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/git push/.test(cmd)){console.error('[Hook] Reminder: review changes before pushing')}if(/rm -rf/.test(cmd)){console.error('[Hook] Destructive: rm -rf detected — confirm scope before proceeding')}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Reminders before git push and rm -rf
